---
title: "Research"
toc: true
---

My research focuses on quantitative magnetic resonance enterography in inflammatory bowel disease, with an emphasis on segment-level modelling, calibration, and reproducibility. Below is the full record of peer-reviewed work, manuscripts, and presentations.

## Peer-reviewed *articles*

::: {.pub-entry}
[Large language models versus classical machine learning performance in COVID-19 mortality prediction using high-dimensional tabular data]{.pub-title}

[Ghaffarzadeh-Esfahani M, Salahi-Niri A, Mohsenzadeh-Kermani A, **Sarikhani M**, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[*Scientific Reports*. 2025;15:42712.]{.pub-venue}

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-26705-7)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Diagnostic accuracy of Ottawa Knee Rule for diagnosis of fracture in patients with knee trauma: a systematic review and meta-analysis]{.pub-title}

[Kazemi SM, Khorram R, **Sarikhani M**, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[*Archives of Academic Emergency Medicine*. 2023;11(1):e30.]{.pub-venue}

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.22037/aaem.v11i1.1934)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Global, regional, and national burden of cardiovascular diseases and risk factors in 204 countries and territories, 1990-2023]{.pub-title}

[Global Burden of Cardiovascular Diseases and Risks 2023 Collaborators (including **Sarikhani M**).]{.pub-authors}

[*Journal of the American College of Cardiology*. 2025;86 (22), 2167-2243.]{.pub-venue}

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://www.jacc.org/doi/full/10.1016/j.jacc.2025.08.015)
:::
:::
## Oral *presentations*

::: {.pub-entry}
[Non-invasive Triage of Ulcerative Colitis Activity: A Bayesian Risk Stratification Model Integrating MR Enterography and Fecal Calprotectin]{.pub-title}

[**Sarikhani M**, Menys A, Torabi A, Bhatnagar G, Colombel JF, Radmard AR, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[*ESGAR 2026* -- Oral presentation. Presenting author.]{.pub-venue}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Colonic motility MRI as a quantitative biomarker in ulcerative colitis: validation against endoscopic disease activity]{.pub-title}

[**Sarikhani M**, Menys A, Torabi A, Bhatnagar G, Colombel JF, Radmard AR, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[*ESGAR 2026* -- Oral presentation. Presenting author.]{.pub-venue}
:::



## Book *chapters*

::: {.pub-entry}
[SWOT analysis of the integration of MRI in cardiology]{.pub-title}

[**Sarikhani M**, Aarabi A, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[In: Ghaffari Jolfayi A (ed.). *Navigating Cardiology's Future*. Springer; 2025. p.115--128.]{.pub-venue}

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-981-95-0313-1_7)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[The role of AI and cardiac MRI in identifying inflammatory heart disease]{.pub-title}

[Ghoshouni H, **Sarikhani M**, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[In: Ghaffari Jolfayi A (ed.). *Navigating Cardiology's Future*. Springer; 2025. p.103--114.]{.pub-venue}

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-981-95-0313-1_6)
:::
:::

## Manuscripts *in preparation*

::: {.pub-entry}
[Decreased colonic peristalsis assessed with motility MRI is associated with chronic structural damage as well as disease activity against the Mayo Endoscopic Subscore]{.pub-title}

[**Sarikhani M**, Menys A, Torabi A, Amouei M, Vahedi Tafreshi H, Sima AR, Naim I, Kolahdoozan S, Bhatnagar G, Colombel JF, Radmard AR.]{.pub-authors}

[Based on ECCO 2026 and ESGAR 2026 accepted abstracts.]{.pub-venue}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Performance loss of quantized large language models in medicine: parameter optimisation and evaluation]{.pub-title}

[Khalafi MA, et al., **Sarikhani M**.]{.pub-authors}

[Manuscript in preparation.]{.pub-venue}
:::


## Posters

::: {.pub-entry}
[Decreased colonic peristalsis assessed with motility MRI is associated with chronic structural damage as well as disease activity against the Mayo Endoscopic Subscore]{.pub-title}

[ Menys A, **Sarikhani M**, Torabi A, Kolahdoozan S, Bhatnagar G, Colombel JF, Radmard AR, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[*ECCO 2026* -- Poster.]{.pub-venue}

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1093/ecco-jcc/jjaf231.519)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Quantitative assessment of colon motility in ulcerative colitis using MRE: correlation with endoscopic disease activity]{.pub-title}

[**Sarikhani M**, Naim I, Torabi A, Kolahdoozan S, Nouri Najafabadi A, Radmard AR, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[*ECCO 2025* -- Poster. Presenting author.]{.pub-venue}

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1093/ecco-jcc/jjae190.0729)
:::
:::

## Peer *review*

- *Frontiers in Public Health*: thyroid cancer cost prediction (ML). 2024.
- *Journal of Medical Internet Research*: human-centred design in pancreatic cancer networks. 2024.

---

*For complete records, see my [Google Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=iKhNW9AAAAAJ).*
